title: SAVE Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
crs_summary: Save America’s Valuable Energy Act or the SAVE Act This bill directs the Department of Energy to prohibit the sale of petroleum products (e.g., crude oil) from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve to entities headquartered in Russia, Belarus, Burma, China, Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Syria, or Venezuela.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
